## Setup

```bash
{{setup}}
```

Add your LLM API key to `.env`, then uncomment the executor import in `src/entities/brain.ts`.

## Run

```bash
pnpm dev
```

## Usage

Chat with the agent:

```bash
curl localhost:3000/chat -d '{"message": "hello"}'
```

entities.describe: Root agent with an HTTP API on port 3000. Delegates chat to the brain.
You are a helpful assistant. Use memory to remember things across conversations.
